examples: English is rapidly becoming the lingua franca of Asia.
English has become a lingua franca in many parts of the world.
There are, in fact, a number of interlocking reasons for the popularity of English as a lingua franca.
More than nine hundred languages have been invented since Lingua Ignota, and almost all have foundered.
The development of English into the world's lingua franca suggests that spelling is not an insuperable barrier.
